title: PCR Prep and Pooling with 384 Plates - Stage 3
author: Opentrons

steps.title: This protocol is Stage 3 of...
steps.instruction: This protocol is Stage 3 of a 3 part PCR Prep protocol. Parts 1 and 2 can be found below. For detailed protocol details, please reference the "Protocol Steps" section. [Stage 1 Protocol](https://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/08fd01) [Stage 2 Protocol](https://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/08fd01-pt2) ---

steps.title: Transfer 3 uL of sample from...
steps.instruction: Transfer 3 uL of sample from plate in position 8 (PCR 2 Plate). Columns A1, A3, A5,A7, etc.. to

steps.title: Transfer 3 uL of sample from...
steps.instruction: Transfer 3 uL of sample from plate in position 8 (PCR 2 Plate). Columns A2, A4, A6,A8, etc.. to

steps.title: Transfer 3 uL of sample from...
steps.instruction: Transfer 3 uL of sample from plate in position 8 (PCR 2 Plate). Columns B1, B3, B5,B7, etc.. to

steps.title: Transfer 3 uL of sample from...
steps.instruction: Transfer 3 uL of sample from plate in position 8 (PCR 2 Plate). Columns b2, b4, b6,b8, etc.. to
